name: Because the Side of Justice Will Be Whichever Side Wins!!

issues.description: Second effect with Trigger has no basis in card text. Card only describes a Counter effect with conditional power boost. The Rest action targeting opponent characters is entirely fabricated.
TrashFromHand is mandatory (uses 'trash'), but DSL wraps it in thenActions suggesting optionality. Card text says 'You may trash', making the entire effect optional, not just the trash action.
Duration should be 'DuringBattle' not 'EndOfBattle'. Text says 'during this battle' which is a current-turn limited scope, not extending to end.
